pi_items.source: Jitsi Meet official documentation (https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/dev-guide/dev-guide-configuration/) states default resolution is 720. Confirmed by PR #3269 changing default from 1080p to 720p.

pi_items.verified_value: 4000 kbps is within Google's recommended range (1500-4000 kbps) for high-quality video streaming, but the startBitrate parameter was removed from lib-jitsi-meet in January 2023 (PR #2194) and is no longer supported in current versions
pi_items.source: Google video streaming recommendations and Jitsi lib-jitsi-meet PR #2194 (https://github.com/jitsi/lib-jitsi-meet/pull/2194) confirming removal of startBitrate and minBitrate parameters
Docker-compose.yml mounts /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web:/config (line 10). setup_jitsi.sh creates this directory structure (line 36). Multiple tasks use this same path.
export_result.sh script (line 13) checks for evidence file at this location. This is where agents are expected to save the served config retrieved from http://localhost:8080/config.js.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Jitsi Meet to enforce 720p HD video defaults. The expected_resolution value of 720 pixels (height) is verified as the documented default for Jitsi Meet. The config_path '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js' is verified through docker-compose configuration and setup scripts. The agent_evidence_path '/home/ga/served_config.js' is the expected location for saving the served configuration. However, the expected_bitrate of 4000 kbps references the startBitrate parameter, which was removed from lib-jitsi-meet in January 2023 and is no longer supported in current versions of Jitsi Meet.
